policy_name: Allow public read-only access to models
Allow public read access to Book_Completo_iZ_Management
Public profiles are viewable by everyone
Users can insert their own profile
Allow anon to set project in-review
Allow public read-only access to projects
Allow admin to link models to projects
check_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM projects
  WHERE ((projects.id = projects_models.project_id) AND (projects.user_id = auth.uid()))))

policy_name: Allow admin to unlink models from projects
using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM projects
  WHERE ((projects.id = projects_models.project_id) AND (projects.user_id = auth.uid()))))
